corrections.text: The IERA award itself and the operational figures attributed to the International Federation of Robotics announcement — roughly 200 warehouse deployments and approximately 500,000 images captured per day — derive from a Business Wire press release that bot-blocked our archiver (HTTP 403) and could not be independently archived or corroborated by any other fetchable source. These specifics are sourced solely to that release and remain uncorroborated by independent outlets.
